figures.caption: Figure 2: Overview of LIGHT. Left: Training. We form different modalities, e.g., body, hand, and object, each diffused with its own noise level. After adding modal-wise and frame-wise rotary positional encodings, the tokens are processed by a shared Transformer decoder and an MLP head to predict clean motion. Right: Inference. We compare a uniform schedule that denoises all modalities synchronously with a staged schedule that keeps one modality cleaner from the uniform run.
